sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71537" key="cenomane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξενο-μᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n71537.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have a rage for foreign fashions,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.527f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
